---
format:
  typst:
    template: cv-template.typ
firstname: "Cameron"
lastname: "Wimpy"
affiliation: "Department of Government, Law & Policy | Arkansas State University"
address: "PO Box 1750, State University, AR 72467"
phone: "(870) 972-2147"
email: "cwimpy@astate.edu"
website: "cwimpy.com"
websiteurl: "https://www.cwimpy.com"
websitedisplay: "cwimpy.com"
github: "https://github.com/cwimpy"
githubhandle: "cwimpy"
linkedin: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/cwimpy/"
linkedinhandle: "cwimpy"
twitter: "https://x.com/camwimpy"
twitterhandle: "camwimpy"
orcidurl: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2049-5229"
orcidhandle: "0000-0002-2049-5229"
google-scholar: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LRQ7rpwAAAAJ&hl=en"
google-scholarhandle: "Google Scholar"
bibliography: publications.bib
papersize: us-letter
---

# Employment & Affiliations

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Associate Professor of Political Science",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  location: "Jonesboro, AR",
  dates: "2023–present",
  description: "Affiliate faculty with the Arkansas Biosciences Institute",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Department Chair",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  location: "Jonesboro, AR",
  dates: "2022–present",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Director of the Institute for Rural Initiatives",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  location: "Jonesboro, AR",
  dates: "2022–present",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Assistant Professor of Political Science",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  location: "Jonesboro, AR",
  dates: "2019–2023",
  description: "Affiliate faculty with the Center for No Boundary Thinking"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Research Director of MIT Election Data and Science Lab",
  organization: "Massachusetts Institute of Technology",
  location: "Cambridge, MA",
  dates: "2017–2019",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Pre/Post-Doctoral Researcher in Political Science",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  location: "College Station, TX",
  dates: "2013–2014",
)
```
# Education

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Ph.D. in Political Science",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  location: "College Station, TX",
  dates: "2014"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "M.A. in Political Science",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  location: "Jonesboro, AR",
  dates: "2009"
  )
  
#cv-entry(
  title: "B.A. in Political Science",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  location: "Jonesboro, AR",
  dates: "2007"
  )
```
# Research

## Publications

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| results: asis

library(RefManageR)

# Initialize variables
bib_loaded <- FALSE
bib <- NULL

# Try to read the bibliography file
tryCatch({
  bib <- ReadBib("publications.bib")
  bib_loaded <- TRUE
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("Error reading publications.bib:", e$message, "\n")
  cat("Make sure publications.bib is in the same directory.\n")
})

# Only proceed if bibliography was loaded successfully
if (bib_loaded && !is.null(bib) && length(bib) > 0) {
  
  # Define book chapters and essays
  chapter_keys <- c("carpenter2024rural", "carpenter2024politicization", "wimpy2017administrative", "whitten2015stata")
  essay_keys <- c("reid2013defining", "wimpy2011presidential", "wimpy2010review")
  
  cat("```{=typst}\n")
  cat("#let my-publications = (\n")
  
  # Process all entries (no filtering)
  entry_count <- 0
  for (i in 1:length(bib)) {
    entry_key <- names(bib)[i]
    
    if (entry_count > 0) cat(",\n")
    entry_count <- entry_count + 1
    
    entry <- bib[[i]]
    cat("  (\n")
    
    # Determine entry type based on key
    if (entry_key %in% chapter_keys) {
      entry_type <- "incollection"
    } else if (entry_key %in% essay_keys) {
      entry_type <- "essay"
    } else {
      entry_type <- "article"
    }
    cat("    type: \"", entry_type, "\",\n", sep="")
    
    # Author
    if (!is.null(entry$author)) {
      authors <- paste(format(entry$author), collapse = " and ")
      authors <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", authors)
      authors <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", authors)
      cat("    author: \"", authors, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Title
    if (!is.null(entry$title)) {
      title <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", as.character(entry$title))
      title <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", title)
      cat("    title: \"", title, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Journal (for articles)
    if (!is.null(entry$journal)) {
      journal <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", as.character(entry$journal))
      journal <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", journal)
      cat("    journal: \"", journal, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Book title (for chapters)
    if (!is.null(entry$booktitle)) {
      booktitle <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", as.character(entry$booktitle))
      booktitle <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", booktitle)
      cat("    booktitle: \"", booktitle, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Editor (for chapters)
    if (!is.null(entry$editor)) {
      editor <- paste(format(entry$editor), collapse = " and ")
      editor <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", editor)
      editor <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", editor)
      cat("    editor: \"", editor, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Publisher
    if (!is.null(entry$publisher)) {
      publisher <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", as.character(entry$publisher))
      publisher <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", publisher)
      cat("    publisher: \"", publisher, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Address
    if (!is.null(entry$address)) {
      address <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", as.character(entry$address))
      address <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", address)
      cat("    address: \"", address, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Year
    if (!is.null(entry$year)) {
      cat("    year: \"", as.character(entry$year), "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Volume
    if (!is.null(entry$volume)) {
      cat("    volume: \"", as.character(entry$volume), "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Number
    if (!is.null(entry$number)) {
      cat("    number: \"", as.character(entry$number), "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Pages
    if (!is.null(entry$pages)) {
      pages <- as.character(entry$pages)
      pages <- gsub("--", "–", pages)
      cat("    pages: \"", pages, "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # DOI
    if (!is.null(entry$doi)) {
      cat("    doi: \"", as.character(entry$doi), "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # URL
    if (!is.null(entry$url)) {
      cat("    url: \"", as.character(entry$url), "\",\n", sep="")
    }
    
    # Note
    if (!is.null(entry$note)) {
      note <- gsub("\\{|\\}", "", as.character(entry$note))
      note <- gsub("\"", "\\\"", note)
      cat("    note: \"", note, "\"\n", sep="")
    } else {
      cat("    // end entry\n")
    }
    
    cat("  )")
  }
  
  cat("\n)\n\n")
  
  cat("#text(size: 9pt, fill: color-lightgray, style: \"italic\")[\\* indicates equal authorship; author order is alphabetical]\n\n")
  
  cat("#display-publications-from-data(\n")
  cat("  publications: my-publications,\n")
  cat("  bold-name: \"Cameron Wimpy\",\n")
  cat("  reverse-numbering: true,\n")
  cat("  categories: (\n")
  cat("    (\"article\", \"Journal Articles\"),\n")
  cat("    (\"incollection\", \"Book Chapters\"),\n")
  cat("    (\"essay\", \"Essays & Reviews\")\n")
  cat("  )\n")
  cat(")\n")
  cat("```\n")
  
} else {
  cat("Bibliography could not be loaded. Using fallback.\n")
  cat("```{=typst}\n")
  cat("// Error: Could not load publications.bib\n")
  cat("```\n")
}
```

## Research Interests

```{=typst}
#service-list(("Comparative Public Administration & Policy", "Election Administration", "Political Economy", "Political Methodology", "Spatial Econometrics"))
```
# Grants

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Institute for Rural Initiatives Startup Funding",
  organization: "Arkansas State University Research Technology and Transfer",
  dates: "2025",
  amount: "$225,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Election Trust Initiative",
  organization: "Election Trust Initiative",
  dates: "2025",
  amount: "$47,612",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Ensuring Usability/Disability Access within the Voting Experience",
  organization: "Rutgers University (Sub-grant from MIT and Election Trust Initiative)",
  dates: "2023",
  amount: "$10,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Exploring Rural Election Administration with Special Attention to the Mississippi River Delta",
  organization: "MIT Election Data and Science Lab and Election Trust Initiative",
  dates: "2022",
  amount: "$95,173",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Vaccine Hesitancy Among College and University Students in Arkansas",
  organization: "Arkansas Department of Health (CDC sub-award, co-PI with Amanda M. Carpenter)",
  dates: "2022",
  amount: "$32,042",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Should We Stay or Should We Go Now? Examining Americans' Attitudes Towards Separation and Unity",
  organization: "Arkansas State University Faculty Research Grant (co-PI with William P. McLean)",
  dates: "2021",
  amount: "$10,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Developing a Public Health Preparedness Dashboard for Rural Communities",
  organization: "Arkansas Biosciences Institute (co-PI with Amanda M. Carpenter)",
  dates: "2020",
  amount: "$12,583",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Liberal Arts Professional Development Grant",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2014",
  amount: "$6,331",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Liberal Arts Faculty-Student Collaboration Grant",
  organization: "Texas A&M University (with Kenneth J. Meier)",
  dates: "2013",
  amount: "$2,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Liberal Arts Vision 2020 Dissertation Enhancement Award",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2013",
  amount: "$5,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Liberal Arts Professional Development Grant",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2012",
  amount: "$4,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Fieldwork grants for research in South Sudan",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2010–2011",
  amount: "$5,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Middle East Studies grant for Arabic study and fieldwork in Yemen",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2009",
  amount: "$5,000",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Middle East Studies grant for Arabic study and fieldwork in Oman and the United Arab Emirates",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2006",
  amount: "$5,000",
)
#pagebreak()
```

```{=typst}
#section("Conference Presentations")

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Local Jurisdiction Website Coding: Does Rurality Matter?”",
  organization: "Election Sciences, Reform, and Administration Conference (with Ellie Foote and William McLean)",
  location: "Athens, GA",
  dates: "June 2023",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Engaging with Rural Election Administrators in the Mississippi River Delta Region”",
  organization: "Election Sciences, Reform, and Administration Conference (with William McLean)", 
  location: "Athens, GA",
  dates: "June 2023",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Analyzing the Impact of Rurality on Election Administration”",
  organization: "Election Sciences, Reform, and Administration Conference",
  location: "Athens, GA", 
  dates: "June 2023"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Presidential Focus, Domestic Politics, and Foreign Policy”",
  organization: "Texas A&M University European Union Center Conference on Analyzing Compositional Variables in the Study of Politics and Policy (with Clayton Webb)",
  location: "College Station, TX",
  dates: "June 2022",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Exploring the Interaction Between Rurality and Race as a Predictor of Health Outcomes: An Analysis of County Health Rankings, 2011–2020”",
  organization: "American Public Health Association Annual Meetings (with Amanda Carpenter)",
  location: "Virtual Presentation",
  dates: "October 2021",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Examining Rurality as a Predictor of Health Outcomes: An Analysis of County Health Rankings, 2011–2020”",
  organization: "American Public Health Association Annual Meetings (with Amanda Carpenter)",
  location: "Virtual Presentation", 
  dates: "October 2021",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Are We There Yet? Political Participation in Transitional Democracies”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Murat Abus)",
  location: "Virtual Presentation",
  dates: "April 2021",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“What was that Promise that You Made? Citizen Initiated Contact and Administrative Response”",
  organization: "Arkansas Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with William McLean)",
  location: "Virtual Presentation",
  dates: "February 2021",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“I've Got the Power! Issues Surrounding Statistical Power in the Design and Analysis of Survey Experiments”",
  organization: "Society for Political Methodology Annual Meetings (with Clayton Webb)",
  location: "Virtual Presentation", 
  dates: "July 2020",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Modeling Time and Space Together”",
  organization: "Society for Political Methodology Annual Meetings (with Andrea Junqueira, Ali Kagalwala, Guy D. Whitten, and Laron K. Williams)",
  location: "Virtual Presentation",
  dates: "July 2020",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Administering Voter Confidence in Elections”",
  organization: "Southern Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Austin, TX",
  dates: "January 2019"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“The Great Divide: Southern, Rural, or Both?”",
  organization: "Southern Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with William McLean)",
  location: "Austin, TX",
  dates: "January 2019",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Politics, Bureaucracy, and Successful Governance: The Problem of Political Failure”",
  organization: "American Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Kenneth J. Meier, Mallory Compton, John Polga-Hecimovich, and Miyeon Song)",
  location: "Boston, MA",
  dates: "September 2018",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Poll Workers and the Potential Population”",
  organization: "American Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Boston, MA",
  dates: "September 2018"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“The Military and Overseas Vote in U.S. Elections: Exploring New Data and Trends”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Charles Stewart III)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2018",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Administrative Capacity, Context, and Educational Outcomes in Contemporary Africa”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Kenneth J. Meier)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2018",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“The Capacity of Public Administration in Comparative Perspective”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with William McLean)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2018",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“X Marks the Spot: Discovering the Treasure of Spatial-X Models”",
  organization: "Modeling Politics & Policy in Time and Space Conference (with Guy D. Whitten and Laron K. Williams)",
  location: "College Station, TX",
  dates: "April 2017",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Channel Open: Spatial Econometric Methods for Analyzing the Flow of Information”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2017"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Media at Work: The Effect of Media Freedom and Internet Access on Workers' Rights”",
  organization: "American Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Flávio Da Silva Souza, Chris McKallagat, and Jenifer Whitten-Woodring)",
  location: "San Francisco, CA",
  dates: "September 2015",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Volunteerism and Poll Workers”",
  organization: "American Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Thad Hall)",
  location: "San Francisco, CA",
  dates: "September 2015",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“X Marks the Spot: Exploring Spatial Robustness”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Laron K. Williams and Guy D. Whitten)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2015",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“There's More Going on Next Door Than you Thought: Exploring Spatial Robustness”",
  organization: "Robustness Testing and the Empirical Analysis of Observational Data Workshop (with Laron K. Williams and Guy D. Whitten)",
  location: "Cologne, Germany",
  dates: "September 2014",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“What is and What May Never Be: Economic Voting in Developing Democracies”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Guy D. Whitten)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2014",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“To Have and to Have Not: Patrimonial Voting in Africa”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Guy D. Whitten)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2013",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Does Information Lead to Emulation: Media Openness & the Spread of Social Conflict”",
  organization: "Spatial Models of Politics in Europe and Beyond, Texas A&M University European Union Center (with Blake E. Garcia)",
  location: "College Station, TX",
  dates: "February 2013",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“For the Want of a Bureaucrat: Administrative Capacity and Public Health in Africa”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with Marlette Jackson and Kenneth J. Meier)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2012",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Ethnic Identity and Arbitrary Borders”",
  organization: "International Studies Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "San Diego, CA",
  dates: "April 2012"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Birds of a Feather: Co-Ethnic Candidates and Voter Turnout”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2011"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Should I Stay or Should I Go? The 2011 Referendum in Southern Sudan”",
  organization: "Africa in World Politics Conference (with Kim Yi Dionne)",
  location: "Austin, TX",
  dates: "March 2011",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Civic Associationalism and Voter Turnout in Transitional Democracies”",
  organization: "American Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Washington D.C.",
  dates: "September 2010"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Voter Turnout in sub-Saharan Africa: Moving Beyond Institutions?”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "March 2010"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Cohort and Cultural Effects on Unconventional Political Behavior in the Islamic World”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2009"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Muslims in Dixie: Southern Distinctiveness or Religious Uniformity?”",
  organization: "Midwest Political Science Association Annual Meetings (with William P. McLean)",
  location: "Chicago, IL",
  dates: "April 2009",
)
```
# Teaching

## Teaching Interests

```{=typst}
#service-list(("Comparative Public Policy", "Election Science", "Foreign Policy", "Political Economy", "Research Methods"))
```
## Courses & Workshops Taught

```{=typst}
#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 4003, Elections and Voting in the United States",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 6613, Administrative Leadership",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 4003, Terrorism and Political Violence",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 4313, International Organization",
  institution: "Arkansas State University", 
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 4003, Data Visualization for Social Science",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 3303, Introduction to International Politics",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 6013, Advanced Political Analysis",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 680V, Seminar in Political Economy",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 3213, African Political Systems",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 4323/5323, Foreign Policy Analysis",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 1303, Introduction to Model U.N.",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 3003, Introduction to Political Analysis", 
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "Modern Regression Analysis",
  institution: "FLACSO University | IPSA methods workshop, team taught with Laron Williams",
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 6003, Techniques of Political Science and Public Administration Research",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 4223, Middle Eastern Political Systems",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 6533, Public Policy Analysis",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 3203, Introduction to Comparative Politics",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "A Scientific Approach to Qualitative Data Analysis",
  institution: "Texas A&M University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POLS 325, African Politics",
  institution: "Texas A&M University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "Multivariate Models for Social Scientists and Policy Analysts",
  institution: "Concordia University | ICPSR, assistant to Harold D. Clarke & Guy D. Whitten"
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POLS 603, Quantitative Political Analysis II",
  institution: "Texas A&M University | Graduate course, student instructor for Guy D. Whitten",
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 3313, American Foreign Policy",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "PS 1010, American National Government",
  institution: "Wayne State University",
  terms: ""
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "POSC 2103, Introduction to United States Government",
  institution: "Arkansas State University",
  terms: ""
)
```
# Fellowships, Honors & Awards

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Faculty Research Achievement Award",
  organization: "College of Liberal Arts & Communication, Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Best Published Paper in Political Science Research and Methods",
  organization: "EPSA",
  dates: "2016"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Graduate research assistantship",
  organization: "Texas A&M University", 
  dates: "2010–2014"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Board of Regents graduate fellowship",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2010–2011"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Critical Languages Scholarship for Arabic study in Morocco",
  organization: "U.S. State Department",
  dates: "2009"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Outstanding Graduate Student",
  organization: "Political Science Department, Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2009"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Fulbright Finalist, Syria",
  organization: "U.S. State Department", 
  dates: "2006"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Graduate research/teaching assistantship",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2007–2009"
)
```
# Professional Memberships & Service

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "President",
  organization: "Arkansas State University Chairs' Council",
  dates: "2025–2026"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Reviewer",
  organization: "National Science Foundation Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)",
  dates: "Current"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Reviewer", 
  organization: "Science of Science: Discovery, Communication and Impact (SoS:DCI)",
  dates: "Current"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, University Planning Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2024–"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Strategic Planning Committee on Campus Culture and Shared Values",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2023–"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, University Academic Integrity Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2022–"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Cluster Hire in Artificial Intelligence Search Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, Middle East Studies Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2022–"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, BS in Data Science & Analytics Steering Committee", 
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2021–2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, Committee to Develop a Rural Studies Center",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020–2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Executive Committee",
  organization: "Southwest Political Science Association",
  dates: "2020–2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Data Science Program Director Search Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Visiting Assistant Professor of Political Science (American Politics) Search Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, BS in Political Science Methodology sub-Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, BS in Data Science: Social Sciences sub-Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Computers and Technology Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020–"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Hearing Committee for College of Liberal Arts and Communication",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2019–2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Undergraduate Enrollment and Academic Policy",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2019–2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, Assistant Professor of Political Science (American Politics) Search Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MA in Political Science Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2019–2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MPA Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2019–2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, BS in Data Science & Analytics Development Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2019–2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, BS in Data Science: Data Visualization sub-Committee",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Expert Witness",
  organization: "South Sudan Asylum Cases",
  dates: "2011–2013"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Peer Reviewer",
  organization: [#text(style: "italic")[Administration and Society], #text(style: "italic")[Comparative Political Studies], #text(style: "italic")[Conflict Management and Peace Science], #text(style: "italic")[Election Law Journal], #text(style: "italic")[Electoral Studies], #text(style: "italic")[International Political Science Review], #text(style: "italic")[International Review of Administrative Sciences], #text(style: "italic")[Journal of Policy Studies], #text(style: "italic")[Policy Studies], #text(style: "italic")[Journal of Politics], #text(style: "italic")[Political Analysis], #text(style: "italic")[Political Science Research and Methods]],
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "AP Exam Reader",
  organization: "ETS/College Board",
  dates: "2008–2013"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Credentialed Observer",
  organization: "2009 Mozambican National Elections, 2011 South Sudan Referendum on Secession",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Panel Discussant",
  organization: "2017 MPSA, 2018 MPSA, 2018 APSA, 2019 SPSA, 2021 MPSA, 2024 MPSA",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Panel Discussant",
  organization: "2020 Public Policy, Opinions, Behavior, and Health Outcomes during the COVID Pandemic",
  location: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Panel Chair",
  organization: "2009 SWPSA, 2017 MPSA, 2018 MPSA, 2019 SPSA",
  dates: ""
)
```
# Invited Presentations

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "“Rural Election Administration”",
  organization: "EAC + MIT Data Summit",
  dates: "2025"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Rural Election Administration”",
  organization: "Hubert H. Humphrey School of Public Affairs | CEA Webinar",
  dates: "2023"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“On the Interpretation and Application of Spatial Regression Models in Political Science”",
  organization: "The International Methods Colloquium",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Experiential Learning in Political Science: A Pandemic Roundtable”",
  organization: "Virtual Roundtable at Arkansas Political Science Association",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“The Challenges of Teaching and Learning Methods in the Virtual Classroom during the COVID-19 Pandemic”",
  organization: "Virtual Roundtable at Universidade de São Paulo",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Professional Pathways”",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Simplifying the Analysis of Spatial Interdependence in Political Science”",
  organization: "Instituto de Ciencias de Gobierno y Desarrollo Estratégico",
  location: "Puebla, Mexico",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Lightning Talk on MIT Election Lab”",
  organization: "Harvard University",
  dates: "2018"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“The Elections Performance Index: Future Directions”",
  organization: "University of Wisconsin—Madison",
  dates: "2018"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Professional Pathways”",
  organization: "American University",
  dates: "2017"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Government Contracting”",
  organization: "American University",
  dates: "2016 & 2017"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Introduction to Spatial Econometrics”",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2014"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Using Technology to Overcome Collective Action Problems: A Spatial Analysis of Anti-Government Violence”",
  organization: "University of Arkansas",
  dates: "2013"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Lessons from Fieldwork in The Sudan”",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2011"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Terrorism and the Middle East”",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2009"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "“Introduction to Islamic Politics”",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "2009"
)
```
# Skills & Software

```{=typst}

#cv-entry(
  title: "Languages",
  description: "Arabic (Intermediate Modern Standard, Colloquial Gulf, and Yemeni dialects)"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Methods",
  description: "EITM, Field Experiments, Maximum Likelihood, Pooled Time Series, Qualitative Methods, Spatial Econometrics, Time Series"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Software",
  description: {
    "GIS, HTML, " + LaTeX + ", MacRATS, Mata, Nvivo, Python, R, SPSS, Stata"
  }
)
```
```{=typst}
#section("Certifications")

#cv-entry(
  title: "Teaching with Artificial Intelligence Microcredential",
  organization: "The Association of College and University Educators (ACUE) via Auburn University",
  dates: "2025"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Teacher Certification, Swift Playgrounds",
  organization: "Apple", 
  dates: "2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Promoting Active Learning Online Microcredential",
  organization: "The Association of College and University Educators (ACUE)",
  dates: "2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Teaching Political Science Course",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: "2010"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Advanced University Teacher Certification",
  organization: "Wayne State University",
  dates: "2009"
)
```
```{=typst}
#section("Research Methodology & Software Workshops")

#cv-entry(
  title: "Interpreting and Communicating Statistical Results with R",
  organization: "Statistical Horizons Workshop",
  dates: "2023"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Reproducible Reports with Quarto and R Markdown",
  organization: "Statistical Horizons Workshop",
  dates: "2023"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Text as Data",
  organization: "Statistical Horizons Workshop",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Power Analysis and Sample Size Planning",
  organization: "Statistical Horizons Workshop",
  dates: "2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Data Visualization",
  organization: "Statistical Horizons Workshop",
  dates: "2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Qualitative Research Summer Intensive",
  organization: "University of North Carolina — Chapel Hill",
  dates: "2015"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Qualitative Research Methods",
  organization: "AAPOR",
  dates: "2015"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Stata Courses for both Basic and Advanced Programming in Stata & Mata",
  organization: "StataCorp",
  dates: "2011–2012"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Spatial Econometrics",
  organization: "University of Essex Summer School in Social Science, Data Analysis, & Collection",
  location: "Essex, UK",
  dates: "2012"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Empirical Implications of Theoretical Models (EITM)",
  organization: "University of Houston Hobby Center for Public Policy",
  dates: "2012"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Experimental Methods",
  organization: "Texas A&M University, Winter Institute in Methods",
  dates: "2012"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Empirical Analysis of Time-Series-Cross-Section Data",
  organization: "Texas A&M University, Summer Methods Workshop",
  dates: "2011"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Bayesian Multilevel Modeling",
  organization: "Texas A&M University, Summer Methods Workshop",
  dates: "2011"
)
```
```{=typst}
#section("Dissertation/Thesis Advising")

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, MA Thesis Committee for Jacob Strawn",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2025"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, PhD Dissertation Committee for Tugrul Polat",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "in progress"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, PhD Dissertation Committee for Johnathon Mullins",
  organization: "Arkansas State University", 
  dates: "in progress"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, BA Honors Thesis Committee for Jacob Strawn",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2024"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, BA Honors Thesis Committee for Kaleb Webb",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2023"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, BA Honors Thesis Committee for Sophia Oury",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Summer 2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, BA Honors Thesis Committee for Noah Haynes",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2022"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, MPA Thesis Committee for Reagan Brackett",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Fall 2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, MA Thesis Committee for Amanda Weston",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Summer 2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MA Thesis Committee for Joel Deere",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MA Thesis Committee for Murat Abus",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MPA Thesis Committee for Marylin D'Rozario",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Summer 2021"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MA Thesis Committee for Dylan Travis",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Summer 2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Chair, MA Thesis Committee for Brandon Pluskett",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended Spring 2020"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Member, MPA Thesis Committee for Sue Neal",
  organization: "Arkansas State University",
  dates: "defended 2017"
)
```
```{=typst}
#section("Software Workshops Taught")

#cv-entry(
  title: "" + LaTeX + " short course",
  organization: "Texas A&M University",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Introduction to Stata",
  organization: "Fors Marsh Group & MIT",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Advanced Stata Topics",
  organization: "Fors Marsh Group & MIT",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Mapping with ggplot2 and R",
  organization: "Fors Marsh Group",
  dates: ""
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Advanced Data Analysis Using R",
  organization: "Fors Marsh Group",
  dates: ""
)
```
# Consulting

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Statistical Consultant",
  organization: "Applied Curiosity Research",
  dates: "2020–"
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Research Consultant",
  organization: "MIT Election Data and Science Lab",
  dates: "2019–"
)
```
# Professional References

```{=typst}
#let my-references = (
    (
    name: "Dr. William P. McLean", 
    title: "Senior Vice Provost for Academic Affairs",
    institution: "Arkansas State University",
    address: "State University, AR 72467",
    phone: "(870) 972-2104",
    email: "wmclean@astate.edu"
  ),
  (
    name: "Dr. Kenneth J. Meier", 
    title: "Distinguished Scholar in Residence",
    institution: "American University",
    address: "Washington, DC 20016",
    phone: "(202) 885-2361",
    email: "kmeier@american.edu"
  ),
  (
    name: "Dr. Charles Stewart III",
    title: "Kenan Sahin Distinguished Professor",
    subtitle: "Founding Director of MIT Election Data and Science Lab",
    institution: "Massachusetts Institute of Technology",
    address: "Cambridge, MA 02139",
    phone: "(617) 253-2579",
    email: "cstewart@mit.edu"
  ),
  (
  name: "Dr. Guy D. Whitten",
  title: "Professor and Head of Political Science",
  subtitle: "Bob Bullock Chair in Public Policy and Finance",
  institution: "Texas A&M University",
  address: "College Station, TX 77843",
  phone: "(979) 845-8833",
  email: "g-whitten@tamu.edu"
  ),
  (
    name: "Dr. Laron K. Williams",
    title: "Frederick A. Middlebush Chair of Political Science", 
    institution: "University of Missouri",
    address: "Columbia, MO 65211",
    phone: "(573) 882-2820",
    email: "williamslaro@missouri.edu"
  )
)

#references-section(my-references, show-references: false)
```
